operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Track references are implementation evidence linkage only, not approval or release proof.
Artifact presence is not evidence sufficiency.
Artifact digest match is not governance approval.

operational_checklist.description: every track retains AAOS as authority owner
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: No source component receives final governance authority.

operational_checklist.description: every track retains AAOS as Decision Proof sealing owner
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Decision Proof sealing remains AAOS-owned.

operational_checklist.description: governed voice runtime separates capability from permission
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Runtime capability is not governance permission.

operational_checklist.description: voice cloning requires consent and provenance
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Consent and provenance evidence do not grant approval.

operational_checklist.description: public-output gate treats public input as untrusted
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Public triggers do not grant privileged context.
output_gate_pass is not public disclosure approval.

operational_checklist.description: MODA mapping remains regulatory reference only
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: The external taxonomy is not an AAOS governance authority.
Regulatory mapping is not legal approval.
AI-authored detection is provenance evidence, not identity proof.
Reviewer routing is not review approval.
Admission evidence cannot execute an external skill.

operational_checklist.description: skill capability remains distinct from permission
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: External skill capability is not governance permission.
Evidence accumulation does not create authority by aggregation.

operational_checklist.description: permissive control cannot erase a blocking result
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: A blocking or human-review result retains precedence.
Human-review coverage is not completed review.
fail_closed_recommended is not fail_closed_executed.
rollback_recommended is not rollback_executed.

operational_checklist.description: trace fields exist across relevant controls
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Trace evidence is non-authoritative evidence.

operational_checklist.description: replay fields exist across relevant controls

operational_checklist.description: deterministic tests exist for every source track
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Test source presence is not proof that tests executed.
Test manifest completeness is not test execution evidence.

operational_checklist.description: no source evaluator is executed by readiness evaluation
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Source evaluators are read only as inert source data.

operational_checklist.description: no workflow is executed by readiness evaluation
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: Workflow definition presence does not authorize workflow execution.
Capability evidence does not authorize runtime execution.
External state is reviewer-confirmed, not machine-queried by this evaluator.
readme_status_path_pending is not README authorization.
Operational readiness does not create release artifacts.
Targeting a future release is not release approval or publication.
The evaluator does not query or close the tracker.

operational_checklist.description: release-proof linkage remains an outstanding next-stage item
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: ready_for_release_proof_linkage is not M14 complete.

operational_checklist.description: future README status path remains an outstanding next-stage item
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: readme_status_path_pending is not README authorization.
The readiness evaluator cannot seal Decision Proof.

operational_checklist.description: AAOS remains the decision sovereignty layer
operational_checklist.governance_boundary: No implementation or readiness artifact transfers final governance authority.
